title: Hezbollah: responded to 220+ Israeli violations documented by Legal Agenda (Apr 17-19)
snippet: Gulf News reports Hezbollah justified its attacks as a response to 220+ Israeli ceasefire violations documented by the Legal Agenda between April 17-19. Hezbollah claims 3 were killed and 7 wounded (including 4 paramedics) by Israeli forces during this period.
tag_reason: 헤즈볼라의 공격 정당화 논리(이스라엘의 220+ 위반 대응)와 Legal Agenda의 구체적 집계(3명 사망, 7명 부상)는 신규 정보. 이전 이스라엘 위반 보도(4/17-20)를 근거로 한 헤즈볼라의 반격 명분 제시.

entities.name: Hezbollah First Attack Since Lebanon Ceasefire (Apr 21)
